title: NW2 7BA, PDCG (Group Services) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/QP3706LH/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: PDCG (Group Services) Limited Installation name: Data Centre Staples Corner Permit number: EPR/QP3706LH/V002  "
